languages.text: "Я позабочусь о том, чтобы блюстители усилили охрану и не подпускали толпу на расстояние, где затерявшийся среди черни убийца имеет серьезный шанс нанести урон Вольному Торговцу".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Я позабочусь о том, чтобы блюстители усилили охрану трона и не подпускали шествие ближе, чем на сотню шагов к персоне Лорда-капитана".
"Я позабочусь о том, чтобы блюстители усилили охрану и не подпускали толпу на расстояние, где затерявшийся среди черни убийца имеет серьезный шанс нанести урон Лорд-капитану".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: "I will ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: "Я позабочусь о том, чтобы блюстители усилили охрану и не подпускали толпу на расстояние, где затерявшийся среди черни убийца имеет серьезный шанс нанести урон Вольному Торговцу".

traits.locale_text: "I shall ensure the enforcers intensify their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that any assassin lost within the rabble stands no serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Lord Captain."

"I shall ensure the enforcers intensify their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that any assassin lost within the rabble stands no serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Lord Captain."
"I shall ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Lord Captain."
"I shall ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Lord Captain."
"I will ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Rogue Trader."

languages.text: "Ich werde sicherstellen, dass die Enforcer ihre Wachsamkeit verdoppeln und die Menge auf Distanz halten, damit ein Assassine, der sich in der Masse versteckt, keine ernsthafte Chance hat, {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} zu verletzen."
languages.original_text: "I will ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde sicherstellen, dass die Enforcer ihre Wachsamkeit verdoppeln und die Menge auf Distanz halten, damit ein Assassine, der sich in der Masse versteckt, keine ernsthafte Chance hat, {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} zu verletzen."

languages.text: « Je m'assurerai que les prévôts redoublent de vigilance et tiennent la foule à l'écart de sorte qu'aucun assassin dissimulé au sein de la populace n'ait une chance de blesser {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "I will ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « Je m'assurerai que les prévôts redoublent de vigilance et tiennent la foule à l'écart de sorte qu'aucun assassin dissimulé au sein de la populace n'ait une chance de blesser {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: “我会确保执法者们加倍警戒，并将人群隔开足够的距离，绝不让任何混迹于乌合之众中的刺客有机会加害行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "I will ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “我会确保执法者们加倍警戒，并将人群隔开足够的距离，绝不让任何混迹于乌合之众中的刺客有机会加害行商浪人。”

languages.text: «Haré que el personal de seguridad duplique sus esfuerzos y mantenga al gentío a una distancia suficiente como para que ningún asesino escondido pueda hacer daño a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "I will ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «Haré que el personal de seguridad duplique sus esfuerzos y mantenga al gentío a una distancia suficiente como para que ningún asesino escondido pueda hacer daño a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: 私は、監督官たちが玉座の警護を増やし、行列が大尉に100歩も近づかないようにするよう取り計らいます」。
languages.original_text: I will see to it that the overseers increase the guard of the throne and keep the procession no closer than a hundred paces to the Lord Captain's person."

languages.text: "İnfazcıların uyanıklıklarını iki katına çıkarmalarını ve kalabalığı, aralarında saklanan hiçbir suikastçının Hür Tacir'e ciddi bir zarar verme şansı bulamayacağı bir mesafede tutmalarını sağlayacağım."
languages.original_text: "I will ensure the enforcers redouble their vigilance and keep the crowd at such a distance that no assassin hiding among the rabble has any serious chance of inflicting harm upon the Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "İnfazcıların uyanıklıklarını iki katına çıkarmalarını ve kalabalığı, aralarında saklanan hiçbir suikastçının Hür Tacir'e ciddi bir zarar verme şansı bulamayacağı bir mesafede tutmalarını sağlayacağım."
